# Wooden Elegance
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wooden%20Elegance&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Wooden Elegance
| slot = bow
| tier = ST
| desc = Crafted from the fine wood found in the Broken Forest, this bow will bring style to the way you shoot.

| rof = 115
| range = 
| projSpeed = 
| lifetime = 
| minDmg = 65
| maxDmg = 95
| shots = 2
| arcgap = 15
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 5
| effects = yes
| multihit = yes
| pierce = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|att|4}} {{Stat|dex|6}}

| lootbag = white
|rarity = a|range2 = 7.77}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude>
